properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (e.g. https://app.buyology.com,https://ops.buyology.com).

properties.name: outbox.poll-interval-ms
properties.description: How often (in milliseconds) the outbox publisher job polls for PENDING events.

properties.name: location.retention-days
properties.description: Number of days to retain courier location history before the cleanup job purges old rows.

properties.name: location.cleanup-cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the location history cleanup job (Spring cron format).

properties.name: auth.jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for signing and verifying courier-issued JWTs. Must be at least 32 characters. Override AUTH_JWT_SECRET in production.

properties.name: auth.jwt.issuer
properties.description: Issuer claim (iss) embedded in courier-issued JWTs. Used to route token validation away from Keycloak.

properties.name: auth.jwt.access-token-expiry-seconds
properties.description: Access token TTL in seconds. Default: 900 (15 minutes).

properties.name: auth.jwt.refresh-token-expiry-seconds
properties.description: Refresh token TTL in seconds. Default: 2592000 (30 days).
